# E2E Test 01: Core DSL — play, sleep, sample, synth, use_synth, use_bpm
use_bpm 120
use_synth :saw

play 60
sleep 0.5
play :e4, amp: 0.5, pan: -0.5
sleep 0.25
play :r
sleep 0.25
play chord(:C4, :minor)
sleep 0.5

use_synth :tb303
play 40, release: 0.2, cutoff: 90, res: 0.8, wave: 1
sleep 0.5

synth :prophet, note: :e2, release: 2, cutoff: 80
sleep 0.5

sample :drum_heavy_kick
sleep 0.25
sample :bd_haus, amp: 2, cutoff: 100
sleep 0.25
sample :loop_amen, beat_stretch: 2, rate: 1
sleep 0.5
sample :ambi_lunar_land, rate: -1, start: 0.2, finish: 0.5
sleep 0.5

# E2E Test 02: Threads, live_loops, at, sync/cue, set/get
use_bpm 120

live_loop :drums do
  sample :bd_haus
  sleep 0.5
  sample :sn_dub
  sleep 0.5
  cue :beat
  stop
end

live_loop :bass do
  sync :beat
  use_synth :tb303
  play :e1, release: 0.3, cutoff: 80
  sleep 1
  stop
end

in_thread do
  use_synth :fm
  play 60, release: 0.2
  sleep 0.5
  play 64, release: 0.2
  sleep 0.5
end

at [0, 0.5, 1] do
  play 72, release: 0.1
end
sleep 1.5

set :shared_val, 42
v = get(:shared_val)
puts v

# E2E Test 03: FX — with_fx, nested FX, reps:, FX control, in_thread inside FX
use_bpm 120

with_fx :reverb, room: 0.8 do
  play 60, release: 0.5
  sleep 0.5
end

with_fx :echo, decay: 0.3, phase: 0.25 do
  play 64, release: 0.3
  sleep 1
end

with_fx :slicer, phase: 0.125, wave: 0, reps: 2 do
  play 52, release: 0.5, amp: 1.5
  sleep 0.5
end

with_fx :reverb do
  with_fx :echo, decay: 0.2 do
    sample :drum_cymbal_open, amp: 0.5
    sleep 0.5
  end
end

with_fx :lpf, cutoff: 80 do |fx|
  play 60, release: 1
  sleep 0.5
  control fx, cutoff: 120
  sleep 0.5
end

with_fx :distortion do
  in_thread do
    play 48, release: 0.3
    sleep 0.25
    play 50, release: 0.3
  end
  play 36, release: 0.5
  sleep 0.5
end

# E2E Test 04: Control, kill, slide params
use_bpm 120

sn = synth :prophet, note: :e2, release: 4, cutoff: 70, cutoff_slide: 2
sleep 0.5
control sn, cutoff: 130
sleep 0.5
control sn, note: :g2, pan: 0.5
sleep 0.5
kill sn
sleep 0.25

sn2 = synth :saw, note: 60, release: 2, amp: 0.5, amp_slide: 1
sleep 0.5
control sn2, amp: 0, note: 72
sleep 1

notes = (scale :e3, :minor_pentatonic)
sn3 = synth :prophet, note: :e1, release: 8, cutoff: 100
sleep 1

  control sn3, note: notes.tick, pan: rrand(-1, 1)
  sleep 0.125
end

entries.snippetSrc:
# E2E Test 05: Ring, knit, range, line, spread, chord, scale, tick, look
use_bpm 120

# Ring basics
r = (ring 60, 64, 67, 72)
play r.tick
sleep 0.25
play r.tick
sleep 0.25
play r.tick
sleep 0.25
play r.tick
sleep 0.25

# Ring methods
r2 = (ring :e3, :g3, :a3, :b3)
play r2.reverse.first
sleep 0.25
play r2.shuffle.choose
sleep 0.25
play r2.mirror.tick
sleep 0.25

# take, drop, butlast, stretch, repeat
r3 = (range 60, 72)
play r3.take(3).tick
sleep 0.25
play r3.drop(2).first
sleep 0.25
play r3.butlast.last
sleep 0.25

# knit
k = (knit :e3, 3, :g3, 1)
4.times do
  play k.tick
  sleep 0.25
end

# line
l = (line 60, 72, steps: 4)
4.times do
  play l.tick
  sleep 0.25
end

# line with steps: 1 (was NaN bug)
l1 = (line 60, 72, 1)
play l1.first
sleep 0.25

# spread
s = (spread 3, 8)
8.times do
  sample :drum_cymbal_closed if s.tick
  sleep 0.125
end

# chord
play chord(:C4, :major)
sleep 0.5
play chord(:A3, :minor7)
sleep 0.5

# scale
notes = (scale :e3, :minor_pentatonic, num_octaves: 2)
4.times do
  play notes.tick, release: 0.2
  sleep 0.25
end

# chord_degree, degree
play chord_degree(1, :c, :major)
sleep 0.5
play degree(:c, :major, 3)
sleep 0.25

# note_range
nr = note_range(:c3, :c5, pitches: [:c, :e, :g])
play nr.tick
sleep 0.25
play nr.tick
sleep 0.25

# chord_invert
play chord_invert(chord(:C4, :major), 1)
sleep 0.5

# octs
play octs(:e3, 3).tick
sleep 0.25

entries.verdictRaw: ❌ EVENT-DIVERGE — per-synthdef `/s_new` onset-sequence/notes diverge from desktop (SV61/SV69): beep: onset #4 desktop 0.75s vs web 0.5s (Δ 250ms > 15ms ε) — mis-timed layer. Real engine divergence (the audio verdict stands; the cos heuristic does not apply).
entries.snippetSrc:
# E2E Test 06: Randomization — rrand, rrand_i, rand, rand_i, choose, dice, one_in, shuffle, pick, seeds
use_bpm 120

# Basic random
play rrand_i(50, 80)
sleep 0.25
play rrand(50, 80)
sleep 0.25
play 60 + rand_i(12)
sleep 0.25

# choose from list
play [60, 64, 67, 72].choose
sleep 0.25

# dice
play 60 if dice(6) > 3
sleep 0.25

# one_in
sample :drum_cymbal_closed if one_in(2)
sleep 0.25

# shuffle
notes = (scale :c4, :major).shuffle
play notes.first
sleep 0.25

# pick
picked = (ring 60, 64, 67, 72).pick(3)
play picked.first
sleep 0.25

# use_random_seed — deterministic
use_random_seed 42
a = rrand_i(50, 90)
use_random_seed 42
x = rrand_i(50, 90)
puts a
puts x
play a
sleep 0.25

# with_random_seed — scoped
with_random_seed 100 do
  play rrand_i(50, 90), release: 0.2
  sleep 0.25
end
play rrand_i(50, 90), release: 0.2
sleep 0.25

# rdist
play 60 + rdist(5, 0)
sleep 0.25

entries.snippetSrc:
# E2E Test 07: Scoping — transpose, octave, BPM, synth, defaults, density, arg_bpm_scaling
use_bpm 120

# use_transpose / with_transpose
use_transpose 12
play 48
sleep 0.25
with_transpose -12 do
  play 72
  sleep 0.25
end
play 48
sleep 0.25
use_transpose 0

# with_octave
with_octave 1 do
  play 48
  sleep 0.25
end

# with_bpm
with_bpm 60 do
  play 60, release: 0.2
  sleep 0.5
end
play 60, release: 0.2
sleep 0.25

# with_synth
use_synth :beep
with_synth :saw do
  play 60, release: 0.2
  sleep 0.25
end
play 60, release: 0.2
sleep 0.25

# use_synth_defaults / with_synth_defaults
use_synth_defaults release: 0.1, cutoff: 90
play 60
sleep 0.25
with_synth_defaults release: 0.5, cutoff: 60 do
  play 64
  sleep 0.25
end
play 67
sleep 0.25
use_synth_defaults

# use_sample_defaults / with_sample_defaults
use_sample_defaults amp: 0.5
sample :drum_heavy_kick
sleep 0.25
with_sample_defaults amp: 2, cutoff: 80 do
  sample :drum_heavy_kick
  sleep 0.25
end
sample :drum_heavy_kick
sleep 0.25
use_sample_defaults

# density / use_density  (density = squash AND repeat: block runs d times — core.rb:3973.
# `with_density` is NOT a real Sonic Pi function — desktop errors on it.)
density 2 do
  play 60, release: 0.1
  sleep 0.5
  play 64, release: 0.1
  sleep 0.5
end

# use_arg_bpm_scaling
use_arg_bpm_scaling false
play 60, release: 1
sleep 0.25
use_arg_bpm_scaling true

# with_arg_bpm_scaling
with_arg_bpm_scaling false do
  play 60, release: 1
  sleep 0.25
end

# use_debug (no-op but must not crash)
use_debug false
play 60, release: 0.1
sleep 0.25
use_debug true

entries.verdictRaw: ✅ Tier 1 ✓ PITCH-MATCH — notes identical over 1  (the musical-correctness verdict)  · ⚠ Tier-0 SOFT: level/count aggregates unreliable (Tier 1 pitch unaffected)
entries.snippetSrc:
# E2E Test 08: Math helpers, print, play_pattern, play_chord, factor_q, bools, use_sample_bpm
use_bpm 120

# hz_to_midi / midi_to_hz
m = hz_to_midi(440)
play m
sleep 0.25

# quantise
play quantise(60.3, 1)
sleep 0.25
play quantize(61.7, 0.5)
sleep 0.25

# octs
play octs(:e2, 2).tick
sleep 0.25

# play_chord
play_chord [:c4, :e4, :g4]
sleep 0.5

# play_pattern
play_pattern [:c4, :e4, :g4]
sleep 0.25

# play_pattern_timed
play_pattern_timed [:c4, :e4, :g4, :c5], [0.25, 0.25, 0.5]
sleep 0.25

# puts / print
puts "Hello from Sonic Pi Web"
print 42
print rrand(0, 1)

# factor_q (factor? in Ruby — returns true if factor)
puts factor_q(10, 2)

# bools
pattern = bools(1, 0, 1, 0, 1, 1, 0, 1)
8.times do
  sample :drum_cymbal_closed if pattern.tick
  sleep 0.125
end

# use_sample_bpm
use_sample_bpm :loop_amen
sample :loop_amen
sleep 1
play 60
sleep 0.5

# sample_duration
d = sample_duration(:loop_amen)
puts d

# stop
stop
play 60
sleep 1

# E2E Test 09: Full composition — exercises many features together
use_bpm 130
use_debug false

live_loop :foundation do
  sample :bd_haus, amp: 2, cutoff: 100
  sleep 0.5
end

live_loop :hats do
  use_random_seed 42
  8.times do
    sample :drum_cymbal_closed, amp: rrand(0.3, 0.8) if one_in(2)
    sleep 0.125
  end
end

live_loop :bass do
  use_synth :tb303
  notes = (ring :e1, :e1, :g1, :a1)
  play notes.tick, release: 0.2, cutoff: rrand(70, 110), res: 0.9
  sleep 0.25
end

with_fx :reverb, room: 0.8 do
  live_loop :lead do
    use_synth :prophet
    use_random_seed 3000
    use_synth_defaults release: 0.3, cutoff: 90
    notes = (scale :e3, :minor_pentatonic, num_octaves: 2).shuffle
    with_fx :echo, decay: 0.3, phase: 0.25 do
      8.times do
        play notes.tick, amp: 0.6
        sleep 0.25
      end
    end
  end
end

live_loop :arp do
  use_synth :blade
  with_transpose 12 do
    with_fx :slicer, phase: 0.125 do
      synth :blade, note: :e3, release: 4, cutoff: 100, amp: 0.8
      sleep 4
    end
  end
end

entries.snippetSrc:
# E2E Test 10: Functions not covered by tests 01-09

# wait (alias for sleep)
play 60
wait 0.25

# note (convert symbol to MIDI)
play note(:c4)
sleep 0.25

# loop — tested via 2.times (bare loop hangs capture tool)
2.times do
  play 64, release: 0.1
  sleep 0.25
end

# define (named function)
define :my_melody do
  play 60, release: 0.2
  sleep 0.25
  play 64, release: 0.2
  sleep 0.25
end
my_melody

# tick_reset / tick_reset_all
r = (ring 60, 64, 67)
play r.tick
sleep 0.1
play r.tick
sleep 0.1
tick_reset
play r.tick
sleep 0.25
tick_reset_all

# chord_names / scale_names
puts chord_names
puts scale_names

# time_warp
time_warp 0.5 do
  play 72, release: 0.1
end
sleep 1

# comment / uncomment
comment do
  play 99
  sleep 1
end
uncomment do
  play 67, release: 0.2
  sleep 0.25
end

# set_volume / current_volume / current_synth / current_bpm
puts current_bpm
puts current_synth
puts current_volume
set_volume 0.8
sleep 0.1

# synth_names / fx_names / all_sample_names
puts synth_names
puts fx_names
puts all_sample_names

# sample_names / sample_groups / sample_loaded / sample_info
puts sample_names
puts sample_groups
puts sample_loaded(:drum_heavy_kick)

# load_sample
load_sample :loop_amen
sleep 0.25

# stop (bare code — stops execution)
play 60, release: 0.1
sleep 0.25

# osc_send / use_osc / osc (no handler — will warn but not crash)
use_osc "localhost", 4560
osc "/test", 1, 2, 3
osc_send "localhost", 4560, "/test2", 42
sleep 0.1

# noteToMidi / midiToFreq / noteToFreq (JS-name aliases)
puts noteToMidi("C4")
puts midiToFreq(60)
puts noteToFreq("A4")
sleep 0.1

# rand_look
play 60 + rand
play 60 + rand_look
sleep 0.25

entries.verdictRaw: ✅ Tier 1 ✓ PITCH-MATCH — notes identical over 1  (the musical-correctness verdict)
entries.snippetSrc:
# E2E Test 11: Hardware-dependent functions — verify they don't crash
# These are no-ops without hardware, but must not throw errors.

# stop_loop — stops a named live_loop
live_loop :temporary do
  play 60, release: 0.1
  sleep 0.25
  stop
end
sleep 0.5
stop_loop :temporary

# MIDI output — no device connected, should be silent no-ops
midi_note_on 60, 100
sleep 0.1
midi_note_off 60
sleep 0.1
midi_cc 1, 64
sleep 0.1
midi 60, sustain: 0.1
sleep 0.2
midi_pitch_bend 0.5
midi_channel_pressure 64
midi_poly_pressure 60, 80
midi_prog_change 1
midi_clock_tick
midi_start
midi_stop
midi_continue
midi_all_notes_off
midi_notes_off
sleep 0.1

# MIDI input readers — return defaults without hardware
puts get_cc(1)
puts get_pitch_bend
puts get_note_on
puts get_note_off
sleep 0.1

# MIDI device listing
puts midi_devices
sleep 0.1

# Finish with an audible confirmation
play 72, release: 0.3
sleep 0.5
